title: Leaf's Dye Backport
description: Brings the new dye textures to older versions of Minecraft!
body:
# ![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1cd27312f745f5bb6e4d3cb6e5cab00ac84d59b2.png)

[![Modrinth Link](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg&;n=-1)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dye-backport)
[![CurseForge Link](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_vector.svg&;n=-1)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/dye-backport)

### This pack changes the dye textures to match the new versions of Minecraft! 
_Here are the current textures:_
# ![Textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46a3257876ed1195b6e480f5ac7bb4bdb0e2c2e5.png)
